item.title: Visualizing flight data with ggplot2
item.description: Between travel and finishing up a couple of projects the past two semesters, I wasn’t able to blog as much as I’d like. Rather than jumping straing into research after the holidays, it seemed like a nice time to blog about my favorite figure from the past semester. It was the striking image associated with this paper, though I can’t seem to find a link for it online, so here it is:
